---
title: "Statistical Modelling Process talk given to  IWSM 2026"
author:
  - Mikis Stasinopoulos
  - Bob Rigby
  - Fernanda de Bastiani
  - Julian Merder
---

This website contain the talk that will be given to the IWSM, July 2026 in Oslo - Norway.

- This is longer version version of [talk](StatisticalModelling_talk.qmd) given to the  to the $M^3$Impact research group of the University of Greenwich.

- This is the the actual [IWSM talk](IWSM_talk.qmd).
